ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>5<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>The response is relevant and consistent with the persona but lacks a bit of naturalness in tone, which could be improved for better flow. Short note: Good context relevance; needs smoother delivery to enhance naturalness.

baseline_no_context<TAB>3<TATAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>Short note: Context is not directly addressed, but persona and consistency are maintained well with room for improvement in relevance through clearer connection to the scenario's urgency.
